sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 519 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No. 4194/2024 (Exemption) 2. For hearing of main case. 25.11.2025 Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil, advocate for applicant. Learned counsel states that proceedings under Section 124 of Income Tax Ordinance, 2001 are pending and since this is merely a reference against a remand order, therefore, the same is not pressed under instructions. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
